title: Big Tech Firms Like Oracle Turn to Bonds to Finance A.I. Data Centers
extracted_text:
[feed summary]
Risk is rising as big tech companies like Oracle — the ultimate financial source of the Ellison media empire — need to turn to the bond market for staggering sums to finance data centers.
notes: Verified against final benchmark run (Qwen3-8B-Q5_K_M, v4 prompt). Model assigned T3.
